pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_rect_task.sh showing wget download with convert fallback

pi_items.metadata_value: Use Rectangle Select tool to select and clear the top-left quarter of an image
pi_items.verified_value: Use Rectangle Select tool to select and clear the top-left quarter of an image

Checks: (1) top-left quadrant cleared with brightness>240 and uniformity>0.9, (2) other quadrants preserved, (3) exactly one quadrant cleared, (4) image meaningfully modified. Pass threshold: 4/5 criteria (80% score)

privileged_info_summary: The rectangle_clear task uses a real landscape image from Unsplash (800x533 JPEG) with primary URL https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 and fallback URL https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e. If downloads fail, a synthetic test image is generated. The task has 90-second timeout, 6 maximum steps, and sparse reward type. The GIMP environment runs at 1920x1080 resolution using sysbox-runc runtime. Task success requires clearing the top-left quarter of the image (brightness>240, uniformity>0.9) while preserving other quadrants, which is verified through quadrant-based image analysis.
